TimelineContent.heroTitle: Mụ bụ onye guzobere sitere England ma ọ na eme njem na AirBnb n'ofe US/UK/EU. Anya m dị na crypto, startups na ngwapụta software. Mwere mma n'ụlọ ọrụ capital venture na ihe omume.
TimelineContent.timeline2025Title: Wepụtara LiquidOps mainnet & lekwasịrị na uto
TimelineContent.timeline2025Description: N'afọ a, m nọrọ na-ewepụta [mainnet LiquidOps](https://x.com/Liquid_Ops/status/1905268807746060790?s=20). Otu n'ime ihe karị chị m achọpụtara n'afọ a bụ na startups adịghị bụ ihe niile gbasara ngwaahịa. Uto na marketing dị mkpa nke ukwu (ma ọ bụ karịa) dabeere na ngwaahịa, ya mere m malitere [imewe content](/projects#content-creator) na ilezu anya na uto.
TimelineContent.timeline2024Description: Mwere echiche [LiquidOps](/projects#liquidops) na [Marton Lederer](https://x.com/martonlederer) n'afọ a mgbe njem na orimiri n'ambition na Cambridge ebe m nọ na mgbe ahụ. [AO](https://ao.arweave.net) nọ na ihe mmalite ya na ọsọ ọtụtụ chọpụtara ihe pụrụ ichekwa usoro kwuo ihe owu na netwọkụ. Arụkwa m ọrụ dịka Engineering Partner na [AO Ventures](https://aoventures.io). Gbasara m ndị otu na cohort na nyere aka ịkpebisi ihe gbasara onye sonyere na demo day site n'nchikota teknoloji, mechaa gbasara m onwe m na echiche ọhụrụ - [LiquidOps](/projects#liquidops).
TimelineContent.timeline2023Description: Mghọ mma ụlọ ọrụ mma na [Community Labs](https://communitylabs.com) ozugbo mgbe seed round ha. Alaghachiri [Wallety](/projects#wallety) grant maka ilekwasi anya na [Arweave](https://arweave.org) ecosystem. N'ime oge m nọ ebe a, mebuo [Othent](/projects#othent), Oases na [Subsidise.js](/projects#subsidisejs).
TimelineContent.timeline2022Title: Sonyere Community Labs & kuzie onwe m ịkọwa kod
TimelineContent.timeline2022Description: Mgbe m chọpụtara na itinye ego abụghị ihe na-atụ m anya dika imepụta ihe, m malitere ije ụzọ iji mụta isulite koodu site na mmalite. M matara isulite koodu ngwa ngwa wee ruo ebe m rụkọtara ihe mbụ m [Wallety](/projects#wallety). Ọ bụ ihe mgbawa mma ma ọ dị ụtọ. Emesịa, [Tate Berenbaum](https://x.com/TateBerenbaum) hụrụ m wee bụọ ezigbo enyi, n'ihi ya m kweere isonyere ya na [Community Labs](https://communitylabs.com) dika onye mma mbụ sitere na ọzọ.
TimelineContent.timeline2021Title: Baanyere Crypto VC site n'ụlọ mụ
TimelineContent.timeline2021Description: Enweta m ọrụ ịmụta n'ụlọ ọrụ venture capital crypto site na nkalanma ọnwa na-agara aga. Arụrụ m ọrụ maka ọnwa 3 na-enweghị ụgwọ tupu ha nye m ọrụ nlereanya akwụ ụgwọ, achọ m ruo ọnwa iri na otu. Nara m oge ka m eme mkpa nlerite n'ụbọchị dealflow, deere m ihe n'ọtụtụ ụlọ ọrụ investment committee na agbakwunye m na ndị nwere echiche chọrọ iche ụlọ ọrụ ahụ. N'afọ a m gbasara [Polkadot Ambassador](https://polkadot.com/community/ambassador-program) ebe m nyere aka ibuo community na mezu ike IRL London picnic ebe ihe karịrị 100 mmadụ bịa gụnyere ndị otu ecosystem na ndị nwere echiche.
TimelineContent.timeline2020Title: Crypto Teen & ịpụ na drama school
TimelineContent.timeline2020Description: Mgbe m nọ na drama school na [Emil Dale Academy](https://www.emildale.co.uk), malaite Crypto TikTok educational channel nke achọ ịkụziri Gen Z naanị ihe banyere Crypto. Maka iji baanyere ụlọ ọrụ ahụ, m kpebisie onwe m inyere ọnwa ikilome 500 ụlọ ọrụ, ụlọ ọrụ investment na ihe gbasara ma ọ bụ na ha ga-anata m dịka onye na-arụ ọrụ ụgwọ. Site na ikilome 500 ụnụ ozi, ihe 6 gbasere. M na-eme Zoom meetings na mmechi ụlọ akwụkwọ site na telefoni ezigbo mmadụ m na-ụlọ akwụkwọ nwere data mgbe m na-ezọ nkuzi maka iche ụlọ ọrụ capital ventures. O bụ oge dị egwu n'elu-elu n'oge ya na ọ na-ado egwu ruo ugbua. N'afọ a m zukọtarikwa ego maka akwụkwọ drama site n'ịnweta ihe ndị mmadụ weghachiri/mụ ka e were gaa na eBay maka ọkwu akwụkwọ mgbe m nweta ihe ọmụmụ site na Gary Vee, o ruru oru!
TimelineContent.timeline2019Description: Sonyere m Ethereum community na 2019 mgbe ọ na-amụte naanị ihe banyere smart contracts.
TimelineContent.timeline2017Description: Mgbe ndị otu m nile na-ere kpi n'ihe emeeme, m na-azụva ekran telefon maka ego.

AngelPage.title: Ndị Founder na m na-tụkwasị obi
introAndElevator: Ọ na-amasị m isịhụ ndị otu na-ewu ihe ha na-anya ya n'obi. Mgbe m hụrụ ihe nwere ike ịbụ ihe na ụzọ enwere m ike inyere aka na ihe karịa ego, ọ na-atọ m ụtọ iso na mbido.

Ọtụtụ mgbe, ọ na-ede m egwu **ruo $10,000** na pre-seed na mbido nke seed rounds. Ọ bụ ezie na enwekwagh m ihe ede aha, m na-agba mbọ inwere uru. Ma ọ bụ ntuze, ihe omume nke ngwaahịa, ndụmọdụ teknụzụ, ma ọ bụ naanị ka m bụ onye iwee ka ị gwa okwu mma na nsogbu, hụ ihe ogụgụ ụlọ na mma n'okpuru ebe a.

Mkpesa, a m na-ere ọrụ n'ụlọ nkwadoo azụ anya ugbu a ma eme ka m dị otu a maka oge nzukọ n'ihu, ya mere enwekwagh m ike inyeta uche zuru ezu maka ụlọ ọrụ ndị dị na portfolio m. Ọtụtụ mgbe, ọ naanị m na-etinye ego na ụlọ ọrụ na-ewu ihe na gburugburu ebe m na-ama ma ọ bụ nke enwem ewu na naanị, ka m wee nwee ike inyere aka n'ozizi nsogbu. Biko hụ ihe ogụgụ ụlọ na mma [mkpesa nke angel investing](/disclosures).
AngelPage.helpTitle: Ihe ndị ama ama m emere nke nwere ike inyere gị aka
helpItems: M enweghị ike ịkpebisi gị na mmanụ iwu/akụkọ, ma m pụrụ nye gị aka n'ọbụ nke nwere ike inyere gị aka — ndị omegbuawu, ndị nkọ, na ndị ọrụ (at gba mbọ ka hụ na ị maara na ị anaghị enwerịkwa ego karị). Ruo ugbua m guzobere 4 limited companies na UK na 1 Delaware C corporation.
Kuzie onwe m ịbụ fullstack developer site n'internet
Ijikọ obere ndị otu nke pụrụ ịgawa ngwa ngwa
Mechie ọtụtụ fundraising rounds site na VCs, accelerators, grant foundations, na decentralised blockchain treasuries
Arụrụ m ọrụ na startups/VCs/corporates at nwere ihe fọrọ nke nta ka ọ bụrụ ihe nile, gụnyere CEO, engineer, analyst, nwere COO responsibilities at bụrụ private software contractor
Dịka ị pụrụ ịhụ site na websaịtị m, anya m dị mma ị gbua aka n'ihe. O bụ ike mma nke m nwere na m na-atụ anya ka m nyeaka gị imụta/idụ ya.
Lansị waitlist nke nwere ihe ọtụtụ ngalaba na tolitere na $55m n'obi kọmitị
Buoo/zụzo/ lansị ọtụtụ ngwaahịa na startup na corporate environments
Mee pitch decks, pitches, na business plans na-adị mma na n'ụzọ adịghị mma

content.content: Ihu nke a nwere ozi mkpesa dị mkpa gbasara ọrụ m inye ego maka ọbu. Biko gụọ ozi a nke ọma tupu ịkpọtụ m maka ohere ịnwe ego.
Ego Onwe M Naanị

Enwem m ego m onwe. Isi m **abụghị** kacha ego akụkọ, isi m **abụghị** onye njikwa kacha ego, ma isi m **abụghị** onye na-terịta ego sitere na ndị nwe kacha (LPs) ma ọ bụ ndị ụlọ ọrụ ọzọ. Mkpebi mma nile sitere na m naanị site n'iji ego m.
Ọ Bụghị Idu Mma

Ihe ọbụla na weebụ a abụghị ihe e nwere ike ịkọ dị ka ego mma, iwu, ihe nchọ, ego, ma ọ bụ ndụ idu mma. Isi m **abụghị** onye nyere ikike ma ọ bụ onye na-elekọta Financial Conduct Authority (FCA) ma ọ bụ ihe ọ bụla ọzọ. Mkpebi ego ọbụla ị na-eme bu ihe gị.
Abụghị Ọrụ Pụta Aka

Isi m na-enwetaghị ọrụ pụta aka ọbụla iji ndị na-amalite ọrụ ma ọ bụ ụlọ ọrụ m na-enwe ego na ya karịa ihe e dere na mbanye ego. Isi m bụ onye nwere ego, abụghị mgbasa ozi, ndị isi ọrụ, ma ọ bụ onye pụta aka.
Ọ Bụghị Ajụ maka Ego
Ihe ọbụla na weebụ a abụghị ihe a na-ajụ, mkpesa, ma ọ bụ idu mma iwu ito ego n'ime ụlọ ọrụ, nke ọ bụla, ma ọ bụ ihe ego. Ozi ọ bụla gbasara ụlọ ọrụ m nwere ego bu ihe mara mma naanị.
Enweghị Inye Ego
Ịkpọtụ m ma ọ bụ zipụ m ihe nruo mma gị **abụghị** ihe na-akọ na isi m ga-enwe ego. M na-eleba anya na ohere ntakiri ma na-enwe ego na ụlọ ọrụ naanị ihe ole na ole kwa afọ (kacha 1-2).
Ike Ntakiri

Isi m bu ndị na-arụ ọrụ n'ụlọ ọrụ mgbe niile na na-eme ụgọ maka ihu na ihu, ya na agaghị m ahụ ike iji uche dum n'ụlọ ọrụ nwere ego. Isi m naanị na-enwe ego na ụlọ ọrụ n'ozọ n'ụnụ m nwa m dị ḿa $ọwọ m arụrụ n'ime ihu, ya na agaghị m si otu ihe ahụ nyere aka.
Abụghị Ọrụ Idu Mma

Isi m na-agbasa ozi ndị na-amalite ọrụ ma ọ bụ ndị na-amalite ọrụ. Isi m na-echeta ndị na-agbasa ozi abụghị ihe nwere ihe dị elu (sefu naanị maka ụlọ ọrụ ihe mgbe ọ na-ege) — [kwa Steve Jobs gụọ ihe ọbụla](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-c4CNB80SRc). Isi m naanị na-enwe ego ọbu n'ụnụ na echiche m chọrọ inwe ihe na m na-eche na agaghị m nyere aka rụba ọrụ.
Mmalite Ọrụ Focus

Isi m ma ọ bụ onye abụghị agwa na mmalite ọrụ. Isi m mmalite onwe m ma agaghị m dum nyeri ndị na-amalite ọrụ n'ụzọ mma. Isi m dum agwa na ndị na-amalite ọrụ n'ụzọ ma a na-eche m na agaghị m si otu ihe ahụ nyere aka, isi m nọgide na nkwado.
Eze Ego Nkwere
Eze ego ọ bụla a kọwara (dị ka SEIS ma ọ bụ EIS) dịpụtara n'ụgbọ onye na iwu HMRC. I kwesịrị ichọta idu mma ego ọkwa. Isi m abụghị onye na-ekwuo okwu gbasara eze ego nke ihe ọbụla.
Nzuzo

Ọ bụrụ na ịzipụ m ozi zuru isi, isi m ga-eme ihe na ya site na nche ziri ezi, mana isi m aghaghi ike ịkọ na zuru isi zuru isi. Isi m nwere ike ịhụ echiche yiri nke ndị ọzọ na-amalite ọrụ. Apụtaghị ịzipụ ihe na ọ dịghị ike ịkọ. Ọ bụrụ na isi m abanyala ode nzuzo nke edere nke ziri ezi na gị, isi m abụghị ihe ighebo ịkọ ihe zipụ m dika nzuzo.
Ihe Ụka Agbañ

Isi m nwere ike inwe ego n'ụlọ ọrụ na-akpali ibe ha ma ọ bụ ụlọ ọrụ nke ị na-arụ ọrụ. Isi m abụghị ihe ghebo mmatuo mma ego ọzọ m na gị, ma isi m abụghị ihe ghebo ka m apụtaghị inwe ego n'ụlọ ọrụ na-akpali.
Ijo Egwu

**Inwe ego ọbu n'ụlọ ọrụ mmalite nwere ike ịnwu karịrị. I nwere ike ịtụfu ego gị nile. Ọrụ gara aga abụghị ihe na-agọkwu ihe abịagọ. Ụlọ ọrụ mmalite abụghị ihe nwere ike a ka ma a nwere ike ịkọ akụkụ gị ruo obi ocha, ma ọ bụghị.**

content.title: UK Investor Status
content.content: Isi m bụ **Onye Nwe Ego Ziri Ezi N'Ụzọ Okike** n'okpuru Financial Services and Markets Act 2000 (Financial Promotion) Order 2005. Isi m nwere ike n'isi na-arụrụ ọrụ n'ụgbọ agbara ego maka ụlọ ọrụ nta na nwa-ahu afọ abụọ gara aga (dika onye na-arụ ọrụ maka blockchain accelerator program nwere inwe ego mmalite).
content.note: **Maka ndị na-amalite ọrụ:** Site na zipụ m ihe ego dum, i na-ekwu na ị na-eme nlelee nke ziri ezi n'okpuru UK Financial Promotions na i na-eche na agaghị m nwere ike ịrọ ozi. Ọ bụrụ na ịchọrọ m bịa n'ilekọta ode ziri ezi tupu zipụ pitch gị, isi m nọgide n'inwe.

content.content: Ọ bụrụ na i nwere ajụjụ maka ozi a, biko kpọtụ m na heylorimerjenkins@gmail.com.
Ịkwado Okwu
Site na iji lorimerjenkins.com ("Site"), ị na-akwado ịbụ onye gara aga n'okpuru okwu Ọrụ a ("Okwu"). Ọ bụrụ na ọ dịghị ike na okwu a, biko apụtaghị iji Site.
Nkọwa Ọrụ
Lorimerjenkins.com bụ weebụ onwe onye nwe ma Lorimer Jenkins na-ejikwa. Site nyere ozi gbasara ọrụ m, ihe arụ m, ọrụ ego ọbu, na ozi ọzọ m na-achọ ịzipụ.
Iji Site
Iji Ziri Ezi
I na-akwado iji Site naanị maka ihe ziri ezi ma n'ụzọ na-agaghị eme mma ndị ọzọ ma ọ bụ gbuo ike ha iji Site. Ọrụ e pụrụ ịkwadebe gụnye, mana abụghị naanị:

items: Ịgba ọrụ ike ịbanye n'okpukpu Site ma ọ bụ ihe ya
Zipụ nje oria, mma ọrụ, ma ọ bụ ihe ọzọ majọ
Iji ihe ọtụtụ (bots, scrapers) n'adịghịkwa nganga
Ire iwe, iko, ma ọ bụ imebi ihu ndị ọzọ
Imebi iwu ma ọ bụ iwu ọ bụla
Ịgba ọrụ ike imebi ike Site

content.content: Ịbanye na Site
Isi m na-edebe ike iwu, mebie, ma ọ bụ mechie Site n'oge ọ bụla n'adịghịkwa ịbaza, gbuo ike iji ihe Site ụfọdụ, ma mechie ndị na-emebi okwu a.
Ozi Ego Ọbu

Ngalaba ego ọbu nke Site a nye maka ihe mara mma naanị. Ihe ọbụla na Site abụghị idu mma ego, mkpesa ire ma ọ bụ ire ego, ma ọ bụ idu mma ego, iwu, ego, ma ọ bụ nchọ. Osi m [ozi mkpesa ego ọbu](/disclosures) maka ozi zuru isi.
Mkpụrụ Obi

N'adịghịkwa ihe a kọwara nke ọzọ, ihe nile na Site, gụnye mana abụghị naanị ederede, foto, eserese, akara ụlọ ọrụ, video, ma ọ bụ ihe m, bu ihe nke Lorimer Jenkins ma gụnye n'okpuru iwu mkpụrụ obi, akara ụlọ ọrụ, ma iwu mkpụrụ obi ọzọ.

I nye ngwangwa ntakiri, ọ abụghị nke ọzọ, n'abụghị ihe a na-ewe ka ihe iri iji Site maka ihe onwe onye abụghị iri ego. I abụghị ihe mezie, mepụta ihe sitere, iji Site maka ihe ego, ma ọ bụ wezụgachi mkpụrụ obi ma ọ bụ nkọwa gbasara ihe Site.
Ihe Ịzipụ Ma Ọ Bụ Ọkwa

Ọ bụrụ na ịzipụ m ihe nruo mma, imewe mmepe, ma ọ bụ ezi uche gbasara ohere ego mma: i jikọta ihe gị, i nye m ngwangwa ntakiri iji nyocha ma nwale ihe gị, isi m abụghị ihe ghebo ịkwu ihe gị ma ọ bụ inwe ego, isi m nwere ike ịrọ echiche yiri nke ọzọ, ma i bu onye ma-echeba mkpụrụ obi gị onwe.
Njikọ Weebụ Ọzọ

Site nwere ike nwee njikọ na weebụ ọzọ ma ọ bụ ihe ọzọ. Njikọ ndị a nye maka ihe dị mfe naanị. Isi m abụghị onye na-elekọta ihe, ezi uche, ma ọ bụ ọrụ weebụ ọzọ, mmebi ọ bụla sitere na iji weebụ ọzọ, ma ike weebụ ọzọ.
Ọ Bụghị Nkweri

**SITE A NY'OKPUKPU N'ỤZỌ "DỊ NAANỊ" MA "DỊ NAANỊ" N'ADỊGHỊKWA NKWERI NKE ỌBỤ OBU** okwu ma ọ bụ asọmpi, gụnye mana abụghị naanị nkweri nkekọrịta, ike maka ihe ọzọ, na Site ga-abụ ihe a na-agbadata, guzobe, ma ọ bụ adịghị njehie, ma gbasara ezi uche, ike nkụkọ, ma ezi uche nke ihe Site.
Oke Ihe Enweghị

**NA NDỤ MMEBI NKE IWUIKE, LORIMER JENKINS GA-ABỤ ONYE NA-ENWEGHỊ ISILITE OKE MAO OKE ENWEGHỊ** njehie, okwu enweghị, na-akọrọ, ma ọ bụ ihe ọzọ, mmebi ike, ego, ozi, ma ọ bụ iji Site, mmebi ego ọbu, ma ọ bụ mmebi sitena ije okwu ọ bụla na Site.
Ihe nkwali a na-eso iwu nile na mma ọ bụ naanị ọ bụ ike iji mmebi. **N'oge ọ bụla, oke mma isi m na-enwetaghị karịrị ego ị tinye iji Site (nke bụ ọ doo naanị).**
Ichebe

I na-akwado ichebe, gbakwunapu, ma ma onyinye Lorimer Jenkins site na ihe ọ bụla, mmebi, mmebi, ike okwu, ma ihe enweghị sitena iji Site, imebi okwu a, imebi ike ndị ọzọ, ego ọ bụla ị na-enwe, ma ihe ọ bụla ịzipụ.
Nzuzo
Iji Site a gụnye na [Nzuzo Mmetụtara](/privacy), nke e tinye n'okwu ndị a n'ụzọ.
Mgbanwe na Okwu
Isi m na-edebe ike iwu okwu ndị a n'oge ọ bụla. Mgbanwe ga-abụ ihe na-akpata n'ozugbo na ịtụdata "Last Updated" date. Iji Site gị ka mgbanwe na-agụkwa akwado nke mgbanwe okwu.
Iwu Na-Ejikwa
Okwu ndị a ga-ejikwa na mezie site na iwu England ma Wales. Ọ bụla ụgbọ na-abụ ihe gbakọ n'ụzọ ziri ezi, ma na-adịghị, ikpe na England ma Wales ga-nwee ike dokta.
Karịrị Otu Ihe
Ọ bụrụ na ihe okwu na-achọ adịghị ike ma ọ bụ na-ejikwa, ihe ndị ọzọ ga-nọgide n'ike zuru ezi ma ike.
Kpọtụ
Ọ bụrụ na i nwere ajụjụ gbasara okwu ndị a, biko kpọtụ m na heylorimerjenkins@gmail.com.
Site na iji Site, ị na-agụ na ịghọta na ịkwado na okwu Ọrụ ndị a.
Mmalite
Bia na lorimerjenkins.com ("Site"). Nzuzo Mmetụtara a na-akọwa etu Lorimer Jenkins ("m," "m," ma ọ bụ "m") na-enkolata, na-eji, ma na-echebe ihe mgbe ị nata weebụ onwe a.
Ihe M Na-Enkolata
Ihe A Na-Enkolata Nke Onwe
Mgbe ị nata Site, m na-enkolata ihe ụfọdụ n'ụzọ site Google Analytics, gụnye:

items: Ihe Site ị nata na oge ị werekhara na ihe ọ bụla
Weebụ ma ọ bụ ihe mmalite

content.content: Ihe Ị Na-Etinye
N'ezie, Site a abụghị enkolata ihe onwe onye ma ọ bụ ọkwa sitena n'ihe gbasaa ma ọ bụ akaụntụ, na-eme ihe a kọwara:

**Ajụjụ Ego Ọbu:** Ọ bụrụ na ịkpọtụ m gbasara ohere ego ọbu site n'imere email, m nwere ike ịrọ ma ịnwe ihe ị na-achọ ịtinye, gụnye aha gị, adres email, ozi ụlọ ọrụ, ihe nruo mma, ma ihe ọ bụla na ozi gị.
Etu M Na-Eji Ihe Gị
M na-eji ihe enkolata site Google Analytics etu ịghọta etu ndị bịara na-eji Site, mebie ihe ma ezi uche ndị bịara, nwale njikọ njikọ, ma na-elekọta ire Site.
M na-eji ihe tinye site ajụjụ ego ọbu etu ịvote ohere ego mma, ọkwa na ndị na-amalite ọrụ, ma ma onyinye ihe gbasara ego mma mmetụtara.
Google Analytics

Site a na-eji Google Analytics, ihe nwale weebụ ndị sitena Google LLC. Google Analytics na-eji mkpokọ iji nyocha etu ndị bịara na-eji Site. Maka ozi karịa gbasara etu Google ji ozi, biko leta: [Privacy Policy Google](https://policies.google.com/technologies/partner-sites)
Iwu Ọrụ
I nwere ike iwu ọ bụla site n'iwue [Google Analytics Iwu Ọrụ Browser Add-on](https://tools.google.com/dlpage/gaoptout) ma ọ bụ mezie ihe mwuo gị gbuo ma ọ bụ mekpọ mkpokọ.
Mkpokọ
Mkpokọ bu ihe obere ederede e ziri na ihe gị. Site a na-eji mkpokọ naanị site Google Analytics maka ihe a kọwara. I nwere ike ịkwado mkpokọ site na ihe mwuo gị.
Ịnwe Ihe
Ozi Google Analytics e nwe ruo ọnwa 26 sitena ubochi enkolata, mgbe a na-ewezụ ya nke okpukpu. Ihe tinye site ajụjụ ego ọbu e nwe ruo ebe o ziri ezi ma ọ bụ iwu.
Ọkwa Ego Ọbu
Ọ bụrụ na ịzipụ m ihe nruo mma ma ọ bụ ihe ọzọ gbasara ego ọbu:

items: M ga-eme ihe na ya site na nche ziri ezi
M nwere ike ịzipụ ihe na ndị ode ziri ezi n'okpuru ihe ichebo okwu ebe dị mkpa
Isi m aghaghi ike ịkọ na zuru isi zuru isi
Isi m abụghị onye re ma ọ bụ ịzipụ ihe gị na ndị ọzọ maka ihe ị na-agụ
I kwesịrị na apụtaghị ịzipụ ihe na ọ dịghị ike ịkọ

content.content: Njikọ Weebụ Ndị Ọzọ
Site nwere ike nwee njikọ na weebụ ọzọ. Isi m abụghị onye na-elekọta nzuzo ọrụ weebụ ọzọ. M na-akwado gụọ ihe nzuzo ha.
Ike Gị
N'ihe n'ebe ị nọ, i nwere ike nwee ike nke ozi, gụnye ike ịbanye na ihe m nwe gbasara gị, ajụ ịwezụ ozi gị, ịjụ iji, ma ịzipụ ozi. Iji ike ndị a, biko kpọtụ m na heylorimerjenkins@gmail.com.
Maka Ndị Nọ EU (GDPR)

Ọ bụrụ na ị nọ na European Union, i nwere ike ike ọzọ n'okpuru General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR). Iwu mba mba maka iji ozi gị bu ihe nwere ike ite eje na mebie ma na-acha Site ma ozi ego ọbu mmepe, ihe nwere ike ite eje na natobi ohere ego mma.
Maka Ndị California Bịara (CCPA)
Ọ bụrụ na ị bu ndị California, i nwere ike ike n'okpuru California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA), gụnye ike ịmata ihe onwe onye enkolata ma ike ịjụ mewụ.
Nzuzo Ụmụ
Site a abụghị ihe a na-agba n'ụmụ ma-adị 18. Isi m abụghị onye na-elu enkolata ihe onwe onye ụmụ ma-adị 18. Ọ bụrụ na i na-eche na isi m enkolata ihe ọ bụla, biko kpọtụ m iji wezụ ya.
Mgbanwe na Mmepe Nzuzo
M nwere ike mebie Mmepe Nzuzo a n'oge. Ihe ọ bụla ga-ebea na ihu a na ederede "Last Updated" ọhụ.
Njiede
Otu m na-agba ịchebe ihe gị, ọ bụ ihe abụghị njikọ ụdị mbupu 100% nic. Isi m aghaghi ike ịkọ na nic ị zipụ ma ọ bụ e ziri na Site.
Kpọtụ
Ọ bụrụ na i nwere ajụjụ gbasara Mmepe Nzuzo a, biko kpọtụ m na heylorimerjenkins@gmail.com.
Site na iji Site a, ị na-akwado enkolata ma eji ozi dika a kọwara na Mmepe Nzuzo a.

ProjectsPage.title: Ọrụ
ProjectsPage.roleAstro: CEO site inwetara, makwa onye ụtụ rụrụ arụ na mmalite
ProjectsPage.walletyDescription: A [Polkadot](https://polkadot.com) & [Kusama](https://kusama.network/) ecosystem ịmụta weebụ, nke chọrọ igosi ndị ọrụ ihe mkpụrụ gbasara akpa ego ha dị ka ighara ego, ojiji kwa onwa, CSV emepụta na ego lụrụ n'ọtụtụ njehie netwọk. M ziri ihe ngosi 2 site na [Kusama DAO](https://dune.com/substrate/kusama-gov), nke e mesịrị laghachi ka m chọrọ iso [Community Labs](https://www.communitylabs.com/).
ProjectsPage.othentDescription: Ihe okwu nke [Othent](https://othent.io) bụ ọnụ ndị na-eji ihe onwe online consumers na-ewe ohere iji blockchain ọrụ, na-enweghị iji ihe nkụ ngwapụta private keys wee eji Oauth akwụkụ dịka Google. Mbuuo m ọrụ ahụ dịka mma 1 njiri incubated na [Community Labs](https://www.communitylabs.com), ụlọ ọrụ software development nke guzobere [Tate Berenbaum](https://x.com/TateBerenbaum) na [Arweave](https://arweave.org) ecosystem. [Othent](https://othent.io) mechaa nwetaa [Wander](https://wander.app) n'okwu ngwaahịa ha, [Arweave](https://arweave.org) & [AO](https://ao.arweave.net) ecosystem Web3 wallet nke nwere ihe karịrị 50,000 ndị na-eji, na-eme [Wander Connect](https://www.wander.app/connect).
ProjectsPage.liquidOpsDescription: A ihe nkọ na isonye ngwọta mepụtara na [AO](https://ao.arweave.net), na-eche imeghe ihe ndị karịrị $400m nke [Arweave](https://arweave.org) token. M na [Marton Lederer](https://x.com/martonlederer) rụpụtara ọrụ ahụ, ghọrọ nke mbu Fellowship na-edupụta ụlọ ọrụ site na [Community Labs](https://www.communitylabs.com), na-adọta ọtụtụ puku [waitlist](https://x.com/Liquid_Ops/status/1863863983498805473?s=20) ndị ndị malitere na $55m soft-commits maka echiche ahụ na on-chain fund verification, [kwuru](https://x.com/aoTheVentures/status/1813676139795374171?s=20) na [AO Ventures](https://www.aoventures.io) demo ụbọchị na ziri a [$325k pre-seed round](https://www.ibtimes.co.uk/revolutionizing-defi-how-lorimer-jenkins-marton-lederer-are-transforming-arweave-liquidops-1729945). Wepụtaara mainnet, na-enwe ọtụtụ intergrations gụnyere AO Chrome/IOS/Andriod akpa ego [Wander](https://wander.app) ([demo ebe a](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4ODxijaC0Dc)) & [Beacon](https://getbeaconapp.com) ([demo ebe a](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GeQ01-rBUPQ&t=11s)). Anụ rụ, gakwara audits site na ụlọ ọrụ [Spearbit](https://cantina.xyz/solutions/spearbit) & [Quantstamp](https://quantstamp.com/).
ProjectsPage.contentCreationDescription: Eme m ihe ngosi video n'elu ihe ngosi mmekọrịta ọha na eze niile. Ọ bụ m na-agba mbọ ka nke a bụrụ ụzọ mma iji wuo obodo m na internet, igosi ụwa ihe m na-arụ ọrụ ya na gbaghara mmadụ ọhụrụ n'ebe ọhụrụ. Amalitere m nwoke na podcast a kpọrọ [Lorimer's Podcast](/#podcast).
ProjectsPage.cryptoTeenDescription: [Crypto Teen](https://www.tiktok.com/@lorimer__jenkins) bụ cryptocurrency TikTok channel na-achọ ịkụziri Gen Z ihe bụ ihe gbasara crypto, na-ekpuchi echiche ihe na ịma mma n'okpuru Web3 blockchain akụkụ.
ProjectsPage.subsidisejsDescription: Subsidise JS bụ ngwa buoo iji nnyeaka [Arweave 4096-bit RSA-PSS JWK's](https://medium.com/@perma_dao/wallet-and-did-in-the-arweave-ecosystem-5714877fe745) iji Bundie akwụkwọ ọnụ na rite ego gas maka ndị ọzọ akwụkwọ site na [ANS-102](https://github.com/ArweaveTeam/arweave-standards/blob/master/ans/ANS-102.md) Arweave netwọkụ usoro. M na-eclacọ iji nnyeaka ndị a n'ihe ọzọ na chọrọ ikpughe gas akwụkwọ ha, nke ga-eme ka ndị na-eji app Web 2 consumer nke buoo na Arweave naagbachịkwa rite AR tokens ka iji.
ProjectsPage.astroDescription: Astro bụ liquidity ngwọta buoo maka seamless nnyeaka na okpuru Web3 ecosystems. Site n'ijikọ ihe ọtụtụ stablecoins na fiat currencies n'ime otu, unified asset - USDA, Astro na-ahụ frictionless ama ọgụgụ n'okpukru real-world na on-chain ọrụ.
ProjectsPage.coolarweaveaddressDescription: Repo ndị a na-enwe ike ịmepụta ọtụtụ [Arweave 4096-bit RSA-PSS JWK's](https://medium.com/@perma_dao/wallet-and-did-in-the-arweave-ecosystem-5714877fe745) iji chọọ ihe mma na ihe pụtara mma akụkụ ngwọta. Claude ga-agba ama ihe mma akụkụ site n'ike na ihe ọ chọrọ maka.
ProjectsPage.aothecomputerDescription: Enyi m akọrọ m akụkọ nke ịnwere ike inweta domain nke a maara nke ọma maka ihe na-akpụ akpụ, enwere m anya (na ruo na ụmụ ohi), na-agaghị eme ka m echefụ mma ọmụmaatụ ọ natara. Ya mere m malitere ịchọ Namecheap iji hụ ma o nwere mmanya mma ndị ọzọ dị. Dị ka o mere [AO The Computer .com](https://aothecomputer.com) dị mma ịnweta maka $11.48 kwa afọ, wepụ ahu [redacted] 😜.
ProjectsPage.aohtmlDescription: AO HTML bụ ngwá ọrụ na-enye gị ike imepụta ibe weebụ site na HTML faịlụ na-emekọ ihe mepụtara site na AO netwọk site na usoro. Chee ihe weebụ na-ekwesighị echere na content delivery site na onye na-ebughari decentralised dị ka DAO, mwere ihe ọmụmaatụ ibe weebụ ga-emekọ ihe mgbe DAO npropọsal kwetara na Web2 front ends niile na Vercel/Netlify ga-emekwa ihe site n'iji script a.

SubstackSignup.description: Sonye na akwụkwọ ozi m iji nweta edemede blog ọhụrụ n'ozugbo n'inbox gị. M na-ede maka startups, crypto, iji ọrụ n'ihu ná ihe m mụtara site na njem m dị ka onye ụlọ ọrụ.

FAQ.title: Ajụjụ Ndị A Mara Mma
FAQ.a1: Mụ bụ onye ike iwu na-arụ ọrụ Pierbridge, ụkpụrụ anyị bụ ịdọta ndị na-agụ ike n'etiti ndị mara mma ịbanye na ụwa startup. Mụ na-akwado ego na startups mbu ma na-eke ihe ngosi gbasara startups, crypto, na ịrụ ọrụ na ihe nyocha.
FAQ.q2: Ị nọ nma maka ọrụ ndụmọdụ ma ọ bụ ọrụ ntụzị?
FAQ.a2: Anaghị m arụ ọrụ ntụzị n'ihi na m kwenyere na ndị ntụzị anaghị na-akọ ihe ahụike n'otu. Ahọrọ m ikwagide ego n'aka ndị ịmụ m chọrọ ibimu nọgide.
FAQ.q3: Kedu ka m ga-eme ka i zie m startup gi?
FAQ.a3: Ziga m imeyl na [heylorimerjenkins@gmail.com](mailto:heylorimerjenkins@gmail.com) na deck pitch gi. M na-agbanyụ ihe gbasara $10,000 na pre-seed rounds na-agbanyụ agbanyụ.
FAQ.q4: Kedu ihe ụkọ ị na-arụ ọrụ?
FAQ.a4: Emeghachi m ihe karịa na TypeScript, React, Next.js, na blockchain technologies. Mụ bụ onye self-taught full-stack developer.
FAQ.q5: Enwu m iche na kpọ ihe ọdụ gị?
FAQ.a5: Na-achọ m mgbe niile ịkọ okwu na ndị ịmụ, ndị agbazinye ego, na ndị na-eji ihe arụ ọrụ. Jide ihe na imeelụ na [heylorimerjenkins@gmail.com](mailto:heylorimerjenkins@gmail.com) na ihe banyere gị na ihe ị chọrọ ikwu okwu banyere.

FilmsPage.title: Ihe nkiri & TV
FilmsPage.subtitle: Akwukwo m nke nyocha ihe nkiri na TV
FilmsPage.marginCallDescription: Ihe nkiri siri ike na 24 awa na ụlọ ọrụ mgbakwunye Wall Street nwere ohere ịdapụta.
FilmsPage.theBigShortDescription: Akụkọ na-asị asị n'ụzọ ajọ ma na-asị eziokwu nke ndị nyochara na-ekwubeta ma na-eri mkpa site na 2008 ụlọ akụ.
FilmsPage.theWolfOfWallStreetDescription: Akụkọ eziokwu na-anya mgbe nile nke Jordan Belfort, onye na-ebu ego-ego na-aghara ndị na-ebute ego ụtụ ntakịrị mgbe ọ na-ebi ndu dị ukwu.
FilmsPage.billionsDescription: Ihe nkiri dị ukwu gbasara onye na-achịkwa ego na otu ụbụrụ na ndị aka ọrụ ụlọikpe.
FilmsPage.goldDescription: Dabere na eziokwu, otu nwoke na-achọ ọrụ gbakọọ na ọkachaala ihe iji chọta ọlaedo na ọzọ Indonesia, na-eduga na nnukwu ihe.
FilmsPage.warDogsDescription: Ụmụ nwoke abụọ na-eri okwu mmalite gọọmenti iji ghọo ndị na-ebụ ngwa agha n'ụwa, dabere na akụkọ na-anya.
FilmsPage.uncutGemsDescription: Ọkachaala mma n'ụlọ egwu New York na-emekwu obi-egwu dị egwu iji guzokwa ụlọ ego ọtụtụ.
FilmsPage.catchMeIfYouCanDescription: Eziokwu nke Frank Abagnale Jr., otu nwoke ịgba èkwè nwere iyom ọka na-eme ka ọ bụ pilot, diokịta, na onye ọka ihe - niile tupu ọ zuo afọ 19.
FilmsPage.wecrashedDescription: Mwute na mwakpo nke WeWork na onye ndu ya na-anya mgbe nile maọbụ nke ike.
FilmsPage.djangoUnchainedDescription: Otu nwoke a zụpụtala na-abakọ na onye na-achọ ọrụ German iji gbaghara nwunye ya pụta na ọkachaala ọjọ Mississippi.
FilmsPage.pulpFictionDescription: Akụkọ e jikọtala gbasara mmehie na ihuanike na Los Angeles, a sị na Tarantino ruo na ụzọ ajọjọ.
FilmsPage.inglouriousBasterdsDescription: Otu ndị agha ndị Juu-American na-ezukọ iji gbuo ụmụ eze Nazi na France na Second World War.
FilmsPage.kidulthoodDescription: Ụkọ ma sọ n'ụzọ ziri ezi nke 48 awa n'ụlọ ụmụ agbọghọ di na West London.
FilmsPage.adulthoodDescription: Afọ isii ka ihe zutere n'akụkọ nke Kidulthood, Sam bụ ndi na-ebupụ n'ụlọ mkpọ ma o kara nwayọọ mmebi ya.
FilmsPage.brotherhoodDescription: Okwu nke anọ n'igbo atọ na-agbasokwu Sam ka ọ na-agbalị ịhapụ mmebi ya mgbe ndị iro ochie na-apụta.
FilmsPage.riseOfTheFootsoldierDescription: Eziokwu njọ nke onye na-eme egwu na mpụta ghọrọ onye ọmarịcha na Essex na 1980s na 90s.
FilmsPage.topBoySummerhouseDescription: Usoro Channel 4 mụ na-agbasokwu ndị na-ere ogwu na-azụ obe na mmekọ Hackney, East London.
FilmsPage.topBoyDescription: Netflix gbanwee na-agbasokwu akụkọ nke Dushane na Sully ka ha na-akọrọ ọzọ n'ọrụ ogwu London.
FilmsPage.peakyBlindersDescription: Ọkachaala onye ọmarịcha mmadụ na 1920s Birmingham, na-agbasokwu ndị Shelby na-ariri gụdụ.
FilmsPage.snatchDescription: Netwọk ihe ejighị mma nke ndị ọkachaala London, ndị na-azụ ike na ngụ anụ, na mkpọrọ acha ọlaedo na-akọ n'ụzọ satịa.
FilmsPage.lockStockAndTwoSmokingBarrelsDescription: Ụmụ nwoke anọ East End mụ na-etolite na mmekọ mgbe ka gwem e ji ụgwọ mkpọrọ na-ahapụ ha na ụlọ akụ ọkara.
FilmsPage.breakingBadDescription: Onye nkuzi kemistri ụlọ sekọndu ghọrọ onye na-emekwu ihe n'akwụkwọ kemistri mgbe ọ hụrụ na ọ nwere ọrịa nwụọ.
FilmsPage.betterCallSaulDescription: Ụkọ mmebi nke Breaking Bad na-agbasokwu Jimmy McGill, onye ọka ihe nta na-agharia ghọ Saul Goodman.
FilmsPage.elCaminoABreakingBadMovieDescription: Na-agbasokwu ihe zutere n'akụkọ Breaking Bad, Jesse Pinkman na-eme ka ọ pụta ma ọ kara nwayọọ ihe gara aga iji kọwaa ọmarị ọhụu.
FilmsPage.interstellarDescription: Otu ndị na-eme nchọcha na-azụ ohere site na wormhole iji chọta ọchịchị ọhụu ka ụwa ruo n'ụkụ.
FilmsPage.parasiteDescription: Ụlọ ogbenye na-emekwu ihe iji batakọ n'ụlọ ogbugbu mma, na-eduga na ihe ọjọ ma na ọchị ọjọ.
FilmsPage.blackMirrorDescription: Usoro nke ihe ọjọ mma gbasara ike ike nke tekọlọji na ụzọ ọ na-emetụta mmadụ ugbu a.
FilmsPage.oblivionDescription: Na ụwa nwụrụ anwụ, onye na-ahụ drone na-agụnye ngwa agha nwụrụ na amaghị ihe ọ ma.
FilmsPage.exMachinaDescription: Otu nwoke na-eji kọmpụta a họpụtara iji soro n'iji ule ihe nwere elu nke robot na-akara elu.
FilmsPage.iAmMotherDescription: Otu nwa agbọghọ ka a mụrụ site na ọkachaala n'ụlọ okpuru ala na-amalite iji mụta banyere ụwa ya mgbe onye ọ na-abia.
FilmsPage.snowpiercerDescription: Na ụwa oyi nwụrụ anwụ, ndị ndu ikpeazu ka-ebiri na ụgbọ-ụzọ na-agagharị ọtụtụ mgbe na ihe ike.
FilmsPage.getOutDescription: Otu nwoke Blak na-agbọ nye ụlọ nwunye ya ocha na-ahụ ihe ọjọ na-apụta na ihe mkpa ọjọ.
FilmsPage.prisonersDescription: Mgbe ụmụ agbọghọ abụọ pụrụ, nna akọ na onye ọka ọrụ na-agbasokwu ihe ọkụ iji chọta ha.
FilmsPage.birdBoxDescription: Otu nwaanyị na ụmụ ya na-eme ka ọ na-azụ ihe ọjọ abanyela iji gbaghara ihe ọjọ na-eme ka mmadụ nwụọ.
FilmsPage.thePlatformDescription: Na ụlọ mkpọ etiti na ihe na-atụbasiakwa nwa kwu n'asa, ndị mkpọ na-alụ ọgụ maka nri na ibe.
FilmsPage.thePlatform2Description: Otu ndị mkpọ ọhụu na-eche ụlọ etiti na iwu ọhụu na-eme ka ịdị adị ka ihe mkpa.
FilmsPage.glassOnionAKnivesOutMysteryDescription: Detective Benoit Blanc na-agbọ n'ada ego nke onye na-eji tekọlọji ọkụ na Greece iji kọwaa ihe mkpa ọhụu.
FilmsPage.dontLookUpDescription: Ndị na-amụ mbara igwe abụọ na-achọta bọọl na-agbakọ ụwa maọbụ na-agbalị ịkọ ụwa na-eche atu n'ụzọ ezie.
FilmsPage.thePerksOfBeingAWallflowerDescription: Otu nwoke nta na-ekwubeta na-agụ ihe ọjọ nke afọ ụmụ na-eto eto na enyemaka nke ụmụ agbọghọ abụọ mma.
FilmsPage.titanicDescription: Otu nwa agbọghọ nwanyị dị afọ 17 na-ahụ onye ọka ihe na ngwa agha n'ụgbọ mmiri Titanic.
FilmsPage.thePursuitOfHappynessDescription: Akụkọ na-enye obi ụtụ nke Chris Gardner, otu onye na-ebụ ego na-enwe ụlọ ka ọ na-azụ ụmụ na-ebụ ọrụ ụlọ akụ.
FilmsPage.theBoyInTheStripedPyjamasDescription: Enyi mma nke nwa ndu okike Nazi na nwoki Juu ka mmekọ ụlọ mkpọ.
FilmsPage.jokerDescription: Onye ịchị ọchị na-ajụ na-agharia ghọ onye ọmarịcha mmadụ nke Gotham City - Joker.
FilmsPage.theIrishmanDescription: Onye na-agbazụ ogwe dị agadi na-echeta ndụ ya na-emehie, mmekọ ya na Bufalino, na mwakpo nke Jimmy Hoffa.
FilmsPage.forrestGumpDescription: Otu nwoke obi mma nwere ọmụmụ nta na-emet ihe na-emute n'akụkọ ụwa na 20th century.
FilmsPage.theQueensGambitDescription: Otu nwa alụsa chess ka onye ọrụ na-anapụ na-abọ n'elu ka ọ na-agbafu ụmụ nwoke n'ụka chess na Cold War.
FilmsPage.babyReindeerDescription: Otu onye ịchị ọchị na-agụ ndụ dị njọ mgbe ọ hụrụ otu nwaanyị na ụlọ ihe ịnụ ọfụ nwere obi.
FilmsPage.dexterDescription: Otu onye na-agụ ọbara na polisi Miami na-akwa ndụ abụọ ka onye na-agbazụ ogwe na-ebụ ndị ọzọ.
FilmsPage.tigerKingDescription: Akụkọ na-anya nkali eziokwu nke Joe Exotic, onye na-achịkwa zoo na mmekọ mma mmadụ na iko.
FilmsPage.jimmySavileABritishHorrorStoryDescriptio: Akọwapụtara mkpọ gbasara Jimmy Savile na ọ kemgidere akụkọ ọjọ nweli n'azụ ihe ọka.
FilmsPage.hitlerTheRiseOfEvilDescription: Ihe nkiri abụọ gbasara ndụ mwakpo Hitler na ụzọ ọjọ ọ na-abanye ike n'Ọgini.
FilmsPage.squidGameDescription: Ọtụtụ mmadụ na-achọ ụlọ akụ na-anabata oku iji gwem ụmụ ka ha nwere ihe dị njọ.
FilmsPage.theExpendablesDescription: Otu ndị na-agbazụ ike na-ebupu otu onye ọmarịcha nwanyị mmadụ na ụzọ mma.
FilmsPage.theExpendables2Description: Ndị na-agbazụ ike na-akpọkọta ọzọ ka ha na-eme ka ọrụ mma na-agbafu na ụzọ ogu.
FilmsPage.theExpendables3Description: Barney Ross na-akpọ ndị na-agbazụ ike ọhụu iji gbuo otu ụmụ eze ka o ghọrọ onye na-ebụ ngwa agha.
FilmsPage.avengersEndgameDescription: Ndị Avengers na-akpọkọta ka ịdabere n'oge nke Thanos gbaghara ụwa.
FilmsPage.angelHasFallenDescription: Secret Service onye na-achịkwa nke aha Mike Banning ka a gbara mfụ maka ịgbu eze n'ohu.
FilmsPage.londonHasFallenDescription: Ndị eze na-enwe oke na-adị anya na mgbe gọọ Prime Minister Britain nwụọ, Mike Banning na-achịkwa eze.
FilmsPage.jurassicWorldDescription: Ụlọ ihe nkiri dinosau na-arụ ọrụ nke ọma na-awụ n'ụzọ ọjọ mgbe dinosau a gbara aghaghachi.
FilmsPage.jurassicWorldFallenKingdomDescription: Otu ndị na-agụbata dinosau pụta na nnukwu agụ na-agburu ihe na-eme ka ike.
FilmsPage.homefrontDescription: Otu onye na-agbazụ ike DEA ka-aganye n'obodo nta maọbụ na-ezụ ụdụ ogwu.
FilmsPage.spenserConfidentialDescription: Otu ex-cop ka-alọta pụta n'ụlọ mkpọ ka ọ chọta na ndị ọka ndi abụọ ka a gbara mfụ.
FilmsPage.centralIntelligenceDescription: Otu onye mgbakwunye a na-eji ezi obi ka a dọtara n'ọrụ CIA dị ukwu site n'otu ụmụ sekọndu.
FilmsPage.vikingsDescription: Onye oge ochie dị elu Ragnar Lothbrok na-abanye n'ọrụ n'aka na eze, na-eduga iwe n'England.
FilmsPage.aboutABoyDescription: Otu nwoke mma ogbugbu ka-agbalị ịgba èkwè na ụmụ nwaanyị ma ọ na-emeta otu nwoki.
FilmsPage.peepShowDescription: Ndụ dị njọ nke ndị flatmates abụọ na-emehie na London, a sị na mmụta nke elu obi.
FilmsPage.theInbetweenersDescription: Ụmụ mmadụ anọ na-eme ka ọ na-agụ ihe ọjọ nke sekọndu nke isii, ụmụ agbọghọ, na ihie.
FilmsPage.afterLifeDescription: Otu nwoke ka nwunye ya nwụrụ na-eche ịnwụ maọbụ na-agbalị ịmari ụwa site na ịkwu ihe ọ na-eche.
FilmsPage.derekDescription: Otu nwoke obi mma na-arụ ọrụ n'ụlọ elekere ndị ochie, na-eme ndụ nke ndị nru.
FilmsPage.theOfficeDescription: Ndọkwu ihe nkiri na-agụ ndụ dị njọ nke ndị ọrụ n'ọrụ mgbakwunye peepa na Slough.
FilmsPage.badEducationDescription: Otu onye nkuzi na-agbalị na ụlọ sekọndu na-eme ka ọ na-agbawu ụmụ na ndị ọrụ.
FilmsPage.orangeIsTheNewBlackDescription: Otu nwaanyị mma ogbugbu ka-abanyete ụlọ mkpọ mma nwaanyị maka mmehie nke afọ iri.
FilmsPage.brooklynNinenineDescription: Otu onye ọka ihe nzuzo ma na-agbalị na ndị ọrụ ọzọ na-emetu mmehie na Brooklyn nke 99.
FilmsPage.sexEducationDescription: Otu nwa nta na-emehie ka nne ya bụ nwanyị nke ọfụ na-ekatụ ụlọ sekọndu.
FilmsPage.thisCountryDescription: Ihe nkiri n'ụzọ ndọkwu na-agbasokwu ụmụ nne abụọ na-ezụ ndụ na mma na Cotswolds.
FilmsPage.motherlandDescription: Ọchị mma gbasara ndị nne na ada na ọka ụmụ ngwa n'ụlọ sekọndu.
FilmsPage.fridayNightDinnerDescription: Ụmụ nne abụọ na-agbọ nne na nna kwa Fraide tupu abalị, na-eduga na ihe ọjọ.
FilmsPage.benidormDescription: Ụmụ ndị ụka London ka-abanye Solana ngwa niile n'Benidorm Spain, maka anyanwu na ihe ịnụ ọfụ.
FilmsPage.hatersBackOffDescription: Otu nwaanyị na-eche na ọ na-abanye n'ịntanetị mma, na-eme ka ụlọ na agbata mma.
FilmsPage.theJobLotDescription: Ihe ọjọ kwa ụbọchị nke ndị ọrụ na ndị na-agbọ n'ụlọ ọrụ West Midlands.
FilmsPage.gavinStaceyDescription: Akụkọ ihunanya na ohere na ụmụ ntu nke Essex na agbata mma nke Wales na-akpọkọta.
FilmsPage.outnumberedDescription: Ụmụ nne na nna nke London na-agbalị ịchịkwa ụmụ atọ ka ụmụ ha na-agbazụ ha.
FilmsPage.freshMeatDescription: Ụmụ sekọndu isii na-ebi n'ụlọ otu n'Manchester, na-ezụ ndụ ụmụ sekọndu.
FilmsPage.theEndOfTheFingWorldDescription: Onye na-eche na ọ bụ onye ọjọ na otu nwa agbọghọ na-agbalị na-akpọkọ n'ụzọ ọjọ.
FilmsPage.unbreakableKimmySchmidtDescription: Otu nwaanyị a napụtara pụta n'okpukpu ọjọ ka-abanye New York na obi n'atụ.
FilmsPage.citizenKhanDescription: Otu nwoke na-eche na ọ bụ ndi ụlọ Pittsburgh na-azụ ndụ na akụkọ.
FilmsPage.stepBrothersDescription: Ụmụ nwoke abụọ na-adịghị iwe ka ha bụ ụmụ nne ọhụu mgbe nne na nna ha kwanyụ.
FilmsPage.daddysHomeDescription: Otu nwoke mma ka nwunye ya nna ọzọ ka-abia, na-agbawu ihe.
FilmsPage.daddysHome2Description: Nna abụọ ka nna ha èkwè maka Kerisimesi, na-eduga na ihe ọjọ.
FilmsPage.21JumpStreetDescription: Ndị onye ọka ihe nzuzo abụọ ka-agbalị ịgba èkwè na ụlọ sekọndu iji gbuo ndị na-ebụ ogwu.
FilmsPage.22JumpStreetDescription: Ndị onye ọka ihe nzuzo abụọ na-eme ihe otu a na ụlọ mahadum, na-akpụkọ ụzọ.
FilmsPage.murderMysteryDescription: Otu onye ọka ihe nzuzo New York na nwunye ya ka-agbọ mma mma na-agbafu mgbe a gbara onye ogbugbu.
FilmsPage.murderMystery2Description: Ụmụ mụ nke film mụ ka-agbata n'ihe ọjọ ọhụu mgbe enyi a gbara mfụ na ọmarị.
FilmsPage.theWrongMissyDescription: Otu nwoke ka-akpọ nwaanyị ọjọ maka ọrụ kọmpanị na ngwa agha, maọbụ na nwaanyị na-emehie.
FilmsPage.thatsMyBoyDescription: Otu nwoke ka na-akpọta nwa ya ka ọ na-agbọ ọmarị, nna ya na-ekubata.
FilmsPage.grownUpsDescription: Ndị ụmụ akwụkwọ isii na-akpọkọta ka ha na-ekele otu onye nkuzi ball na-anwụ.
FilmsPage.grownUps2Description: Otu ndị ahụ na-agbasokwu n'akụkọ nke ụmụ na ọmume na okwu mma 80s.
FilmsPage.anchormanTheLegendOfRonBurgundyDescripti: Otu onye na-agụ ọkụ San Diego na 1970s ka nwunye ya mma ocha ka-abanye.
FilmsPage.anchorman2TheLegendContinuesDescription: Ron Burgundy ka-akpọ ka ọ rụọ ọrụ ị ntanetị 24 awa na New York.
FilmsPage.getHardDescription: Otu onye na-ebụ ego ka-akpọ onye na-asa ụgbọ-ụzọ iji nyochaa ụlọ mkpọ.
FilmsPage.identityThiefDescription: Otu nwoke na-achọ nwaanyị na-ebụ aha ya, na-agbọ na-agbawa.
FilmsPage.dodgeballATrueUnderdogStoryDescription: Otu ndị na-emehie na-abanye ọkpakpala-ọkpakpala iji gbaghara ụlọ egwu ha.
FilmsPage.norbitDescription: Otu nwoke mma ka nwaanyị ya na-agbalị ịkwu ụmụ agbọghọ nke mma.
FilmsPage.hereComesTheBoomDescription: Otu nkuzi baiọlọji ka-abanye n'ọrụ mmekọ iji gbụkwu ụlọ sekọndu.
FilmsPage.chefDescription: Otu onye-na-e-nri-nri ka-eme ngwa agha ụgbọ-ụzọ na nwa ya, na-agbaghachita ihe ọka nri.
FilmsPage.theInternshipDescription: Ụmụ nwoke abụọ na-agbalị ịbanye Google ịmụ ihe, na-alụkọ na ụmụ nta.
FilmsPage.dirtyGrandpaDescription: Otu nwoke na-agbalị ịgba èkwè nna ya na-agbọ na Florida maka mma.
FilmsPage.paulBlartMallCopDescription: Otu onye na-achịkwa ụlọ mgbakwunye ka-azụ ihe mgbe ndị ọjọ na-abata.
FilmsPage.paulBlartMallCop2Description: Paul Blart ka-agbọ Las Vegas, ka-achọta ihe ọjọ.
FilmsPage.bigHero6Description: Otu nwa nta na-eji robot nma ka-agbata ndị na-abụ mma iji gbaghara obodo.
FilmsPage.kungFuPandaDescription: Otu panda na-agbalị ka a họpụtarụ ị eze egwu na-agbalị ịchọ udo.
FilmsPage.kungFuPanda2Description: Po na-agbata ihe gara aga na-agbalị ịgbuo eze mma na-ebu ike ọhụu.
FilmsPage.kungFuPanda3Description: Po ka-akpọta papa ya na ụlọ panda n'ozuzu, na-agbalị ịgbuo onye ọjọ.
FilmsPage.theLegoMovieDescription: Otu Lego ka-ahọpụta ịbụ nke mkpa na-agbalị ịgbuo onye ọmarịcha nwanyị.
FilmsPage.beeMovieDescription: Otu nwu ka-alụ gwem ụmụ mmadụ ịdị mma n'ama mgbe ọ hụrụ na ụmụ mmadụ rie mma.
